title: How To Build a Website With 24/7 AI Sales Agent in 45 Seconds
summary: The video demonstrates building lead-generation websites with autonomous AI sales agents using Readdy, a no-code platform. It covers two real client implementations (car dealership and luxury real estate) showing agent training, appointment booking, and inventory management.
writeup: The video demonstrates building client websites with embedded 24/7 AI sales agents using Readdy, with no coding required. It walks through two example builds: a car dealership and a luxury real estate business, each with agents that answer questions, qualify leads, and book appointments automatically. Beyond the build itself, it covers the agency business angle: white-label resale of these sites and retainer models for ongoing AI agency services.
